title: Manual SSL Certificate Setup in nginx-proxy with acme-companion
rules: When nginx returns ERR_SSL_UNRECOGNIZED_NAME_ALERT, check that ssl_reject_handshake is off and certificate files exist.
Certificates from acme-companion are stored in /root/.acme.sh/<domain>_ecc/.
Copy fullchain.cer to /etc/nginx/certs/<domain>.crt and key to /etc/nginx/certs/<domain>.key.
Restart acme-companion and nginx-proxy after copying certificates.
Test with curl -sk https://domain/ before checking in browser.
Force certificate renewal with acme.sh --issue --force if Let's Encrypt limit is not exceeded.
rationale: Manual certificate setup is needed when auto-provisioning through nginx-proxy+acme-companion fails.

anketa_context.session_summary: Fixed HTTPS on skv.network by manually copying SSL certificates.
